revision.comment: 「[[Template:Transclude]]」を保護しました: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]] ([edit=sysop] (無期限) [move=sysop] (無期限))

revision.comment: I am shocked at how hard this import was but doing it again. Programmatically changed the xml to reimport and fix the problems I introduced
1 revision imported: running a new import to try to fix the horrible consequences of that
「[[Template:Transclude]]」を保護しました: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]] ([edit=sysop] (無期限) [move=sysop] (無期限))
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
